microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end program execution** for Azure's resilience validation portfolio, standardizing intake, scheduling, and operational handoff workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and deliver **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers.

Built a **world-class program management capability** from scratch — defined standards, processes, and self-service tooling for an internal Resilience Automation Platform, reducing operational toil by 30% and enabling scalable, repeatable execution.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as program lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation deployment** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with zero service disruption.

Pioneered a rack-level proactive validation program delivered in **4 months**, achieving a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects, and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across the infrastructure fleet.

Scaled team execution leverage by building an **AI-driven planning agent**, restructuring program workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% without headcount growth.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows across 14 Azure service teams, conducting demos and training sessions that eliminated 37 engineering hours of manual effort monthly.

Surfaced critical feature gaps through **11+ structured stakeholder interviews**, directly influencing roadmap prioritization to include intent-based YAML generation aligned to service-team operational needs.
Improved **program data integrity and retrieval** by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, reducing lookup time by 83% across the team.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating $3M in pulled-forward revenue.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built and drove a roadmap to automate critical execution paths and eliminate recurring bottlenecks.

Engineered a **Power BI program tracking dashboard** to centralize operational toil data across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to make data-driven prioritization and resource-allocation decisions at scale.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration program strategy** and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, delivering a 2,000+ unit pilot transition with zero operational downtime on a compressed timeline.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, dependency reviews, and retrospectives — resolving **40+ high-priority backlog tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake and delivery process.
Drove **cross-functional alignment** across IT, Operations, and Engineering to deploy automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and improving deployment repeatability.
pro_painters: Managed **end-to-end program execution** for 200+ monthly proposals — scoping, vendor coordination, and invoicing — implementing a new CRM workflow that increased job bookings by 26%.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and improved conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy with targeted digital channel optimization.
Conducted **financial analysis across 1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and deliver pricing recommendations that improved overall profitability for leadership decision-making.

tailoring_notes: 'end-to-end program execution' and 'operational handoff' from the JD's core responsibility woven into microsoft_ft bullet 1 and amazon_robotics bullet 1.
'world-class program management capability' — exact JD phrase — used in microsoft_ft bullet 2 to mirror Anduril's explicit ask to build and mature PM standards and tooling.
'network isolation deployment' and 'sovereign-cloud' in microsoft_ft bullet 3 maps to JD's network engineering integration and secured-facility deployment context.
'data-driven prioritization' and 'centralize' in microsoft_2022 bullet 3 mirrors JD's vendor management consolidation and data-driven decision-making language.
'compressed timeline' in amazon_robotics bullet 1 directly echoes JD phrase 'compressed timelines' for multi-site security deployments.
